creator: nemysis@gmx.ch
text:
- Update to 0.751beta
- Take maintainership

Added file(s):
- files/venice.in
- pkg-plist

Makefile changed:
+MASTER_SITES=
+DIST_SUBDIR=	java
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+INSTALLS_ICONS=
+DESKTOP_ENTRIES=
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}

Documentation refined
+PORTDOCS=	*
+DOCSRCDIR1=
+DOC_FILES1=

Generated and tested manually, tested with port test, sent with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.99_6 (mode: change, diff: ports)

How-To-Repeat: 
portlint -A
looks fine.

port test: clean
